pages.image_tooltip: The most populous creature of the early triassic, Lystrosaurus is venerated for surviving the Permian extinction and subsequently thriving, a feat attributed to it being invulnerable, indestructible, impervious and...

pages.era_tooltip_period: Late Permian into the Early Triassic Period
pages.clone.clone_tooltip: Egg must be placed down to hatch
pages.feature_1.tooltip: §7Lystrosaurus are near-indestructable, being completely immune to many types of damage, and become incredibly skittish when injured
